services.name: Deep Tissue Massage
services.description: Deliberate, focused deep tissue work. Sinking layer by layer to target long-held tension, working with the body rather than against it.  If you’ve come with a new or long-term issue, we’ll work directly on it to help your body release and restore ease. The aim is to unburden, and to aid a profound sense of calm that lingers long after leaving the massage table.

services.name: Holistic
services.description: Slow, intuitive touch. Guided by breath and stillness, invites the body to exist beyond muscle and bone and creating a space for calm, clarity and a profound state of rest.

services.name: Lomi Lomi style
services.description: Lomi Lomi flows over the body like water, easing tension and softening held patterns. It is a heart-led massage that is personalised to each client in the present moment. Allow yourself to open up and release, leaving embodied, grounded and energised.

services.name: Marathon
services.description: here, we work on the muscles and the mind through a variety of sessions over your training plan. giving you that time and space to slow down, think about your achievements and give your body that much deserved love.

services.name: Pregnancy
services.description: The perfect gift of time, relaxation, and a moment of care for you, your changing body and your growing baby. Available after your first 12 weeks.
